title: thelypteris pachyrhachis var. pachyrhachis
intro: Thelypteris pachyrhachis var. pachyrhachis, also known as the large-leaved spleenwort, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Thelypteris pachyrhachis var. pachyrhachis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, have been used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
